title: hieracium murorum subsp. pulchridens
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pulchridens, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. pulchridens include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, with typical preparations involving drying and infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water.
